query:
DELETE e1 FROM events e1
INNER JOIN events e2 
WHERE e1.id > e2.id 
  AND e1.userId = e2.userId 
  AND e1.date = e2.date 
  AND e1.type = e2.type 
  AND e1.description = e2.description;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 1grUzB66oStVVFP.root --database gPiHJoB3NKeoE8WP6B5f8y --execute DELETE e1 FROM events e1
INNER JOIN events e2 
WHERE e1.id > e2.id 
  AND e1.userId = e2.userId 
  AND e1.date = e2.date 
  AND e1.type = e2.type 
  AND e1.description = e2.description;
